name: GOLFTEC Brea
address: 910 E Birch St Suite 225, Brea, CA 92821
about: GOLFTEC Brea is a high-tech golf training studio focused on data-driven instruction and practice. The facility utilizes advanced technologies like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized coaching. Lessons are tailored to individual goals, with certified PGA professionals creating custom game plans for improvement. The studio offers a structured approach to golf development, combining technology, coaching, and practice memberships for comprehensive skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise feedback
Certified PGA coaching with personalized improvement plans
Access to advanced technology including high-speed video and launch monitors
Structured lesson plans and practice memberships for long-term progress
On-site club fitting with shaft optimization to match player swing

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor used for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment including clubs and balls for lessons and practice. You are also welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted in the training bays. The facility focuses on golf instruction and practice without on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC Brea does not offer traditional 18-hole gameplay on simulators. Their services focus on lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions using launch monitors and technology rather than full course simulations.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and is suitable for young golfers. They provide a structured learning environment with technology and coaching appropriate for various skill levels including beginners.
